name: System Parameterization
description: Definition of a system parameterization F, parameter instances, and parameter counts (one or multiple parameters).

elements.text: A system parameterization is a function F such that RNG(F) ⊆ DSYSTEMS.
If F is a system parameterization, r ∈ DMN(F) and Z = F(r), then Z is an instance of F.
F has n parameters if DMN(F) is a subset of a Cartesian product P1 × ... × Pn.
F has one parameter if DMN(F) is not a subset of a Cartesian product.
